# AdvanceStore UK

> Genuine mobile accessories. Order on WhatsApp.

## Categories
- [Charging Cables](https://advancestore.co.uk/category/charging-cables): 128 products
- [Chargers & Wireless Charging](https://advancestore.co.uk/category/chargers-wireless-charging): 85 products

- [USB Hubs, Card Readers & Storage](https://advancestore.co.uk/category/usb-hubs-card-readers): 44 products
- [Microphones](https://advancestore.co.uk/category/microphones): 13 products

## Brands
- [HOCO](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/hoco): Global 3C brand. CE/RoHS certified for the UK market.
- [BOROFONE](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/borofone): Style-forward accessories from the HOCO Technology family.
- [Yesido](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/yesido): The UK's broadest accessories brand — 257 products across 15 categories.
- [Kakusiga (KSC)](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/kakusiga): Recognised by the KSC model prefix — value and variety.
- [Jellico](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/jellico): Reliable everyday accessories at honest prices.
- [Aspor](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/aspor): Charging-focused engineering with broad compatibility.
- [BAVIN](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/bavin): CE/RoHS certified accessories for the UK market.
- [Inkax](https://advancestore.co.uk/brand/inkax): Budget-friendly everyday mobile accessories.

## Ordering
All orders via WhatsApp. Same-day dispatch before 3pm.
